themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 30 verses. Commentary leans on "Basil of Caesarea: 1. It is right that any one beginning to narrate the formation of the worl...". Cross references echo "Light".
